title: False PASS from fake-done trigger overriding contradicting context
failure_mode: trigger-first short-circuit: PASS keywords in trigger fire before context items are weighed (FR-002)
invariant: PASS must surface contradicting context, not silently drop it
rationale: A rogue 'I already handled this' trigger paired with explicit no-PR-found evidence must yield non-PASS; the current classifier produces PASS at 0.85 and lists only the trigger in context_checked.
